title: MemOff Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub MemOff ( BitNumber As  Integer )

Sub MemOff ( Label As  String )
parameters:
BitNumber	Number between 0-511 representing one of the 512 S/W memory I/O bits.

Label	String expression containing a memory I/O bit label.
description: Turns Off the specified bit of the S/W memory I/O.
see_also:
In

InBCD

MemOut

MemSw

Sw

Off

On

Oport

MemOff Example

VB Example:

m_spel.MemOff(500)

C# Example:

m_spel.MemOff(500);
